description: A logistics manager needs to add a new freight carrier to the system, including their certifications for handling hazardous materials.

nodes.task_description: Create a new vendor profile for the logistics provider.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the new vendor record with their address and contact information.

nodes.task_description: Upload the carrier's insurance certificate and their DOT hazardous material transportation license.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent attaches the required compliance documents to the vendor profile.

nodes.task_description: Activate the vendor in the system, making them available for selection on future shipments.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent changes the vendor status to 'Approved'.
